strategy: Compressed Browser Commands: converted 9 separate command blocks with full descriptions to single bullet-per-command format, merged tips
Compressed Editor Commands: converted 7 command blocks with examples and parameter lists to compact bullet format, merged tips

Compressed Search Commands: converted 3 command blocks with parameter lists to compact bullet format, merged tips
Compressed Shell Commands: converted 4 command blocks with examples and parameter lists to compact bullet format, removed 3 shell usage tips lines
Compressed Reasoning Commands: merged think description, MUST use cases, and should-use cases into single dense paragraph
Compressed Planning section: merged 5 bullets about planning/standard modes into single sentence
